LYNX FINAL SCORE TEMPLATES

Post-game score graphics for social media. Quick to generate, punchy to share. Wins feel celebratory, losses stay clean and dignified. With and without photos, with and without stats.

1 — The Scoreboard

Classic centered scoreboard. Both team logos, big scores, clean result label. No photo needed. The most versatile — works for every game, every sport, win or loss.

Score plus key match stats. For volleyball: kills, aces, digs, blocks, hitting %. The coach's share — shows the full story, not just the score. Photo optional.

6 — The Tri-Panel

Three action photo strips on the left, score and team info on the right. Scrolling team name ticker behind the photos. Multiple photos make even bad individual shots look intentional as a collage.
